eyebrow.zh: 回放你的请求日志 · 打爆的前缀看得见 · 浪费的 ¥ 对得上账单 · 改完一键对账
eyebrow.en: Replay your request log · See which prefix busted · Wasted ¥ reconciles with your bill · One-command before/after

headline.zh:
你的 DeepSeek Agent 每轮循环都在偷偷多花钱
一段被打爆的前缀，就把整段缓存折扣悄悄掉回原价
headline.en:
Your DeepSeek agent silently overpays every loop
— one busted prefix drops a whole cached segment back to full price

sub.zh: dscache 回放你的请求日志，读 DeepSeek 真正上报的缓存命中与未命中，逐请求定档 HIT/PARTIAL/MISS，把每一次前缀打爆和它漏掉的人民币变成一张能看、能算、能修的利润表。采样在段边界裁切——不把工具块切成两半，多行消息也指得到真正变了的那一段；打爆只归因到真正命中过的前缀，绝不甩锅给 MISS；浪费的 ¥ 既不多记也不少记，两边都对得上账单；改完用 dscache report --compare baseline.jsonl 一张面板看到省回了多少。给跑 DeepSeek Agent 循环、却在账单里找不到那笔超支的人。
sub.en: dscache replays your request log, reads the cache hit and miss tokens DeepSeek actually reports, and tiers each request HIT/PARTIAL/MISS — turning every prefix bust and the CNY it leaks into a profit & loss you can read, price, and fix. The sample is cut at segment boundaries — it never slices a tool block in half, and a multi-line message still names the segment that actually changed; a bust is pinned only to a prefix that actually cached, never to a MISS; the wasted CNY is neither overstated nor understated, reconciling with your bill in both directions; and after you fix it, dscache report --compare baseline.jsonl shows the CNY recovered in one panel. For anyone running a DeepSeek agent loop who can't find that overspend on their bill.

title.zh: 打爆指得到真正变了的那一段，多行消息也不碎
title.en: A bust names the segment that actually changed — multi-line messages don't shatter it

body.zh: 前缀指纹的字符预算以前只在消息循环里管，最后再来一刀截断——工具列表占满预算的编码 Agent，采样正好停在一个工具块中间，段级归因拿到一截残段；而消息内容以前是原文嵌进指纹的，一段带换行的系统提示（编码 Agent 的常态）会被切碎成一串 segment[K] 残段，打爆报告只报一个无意义的稳定段，指不到真正变了的那条消息。现在预算跨所有段（工具、工具选择、响应格式、消息）增量推进，会溢出剩余预算的段直接不追加，没有任何段被从中间截断；消息内容也改成和工具一样的序列化方式，换行被转义成干净的段分隔符，发散的那一段会真正点名是哪条消息，而不是 segment[K]。
body.en: The prefix-fingerprint char budget used to be enforced only inside the messages loop, then a final truncating slice — for a coding agent whose tool list eats the whole budget, the sample landed mid-tool and segment attribution got a stub; and message content was embedded raw, so a multi-line system prompt (the coding-agent norm) was shattered into a string of segment[K] stubs and a bust reported a meaningless stable segment instead of naming the message that changed. The budget now advances incrementally across every segment (tools, tool_choice, response_format, messages) — a segment that would overflow the remaining budget is never appended, so no segment is ever cut in half; and message content is serialized the same way tools already were, so a newline becomes a clean segment separator and the diverging segment names the actual message, not segment[K].

chips: › 多行消息不再碎成残段
› 指得到变了的那条消息

title.zh: 理想花费按完整 prompt 算，不多记也不少记冤枉钱
title.en: Ideal cost uses the full prompt — no phantom money, no phantom savings

body.zh: 反事实假设是「整段 prompt 当初都命中缓存」，而整段 prompt 就是 DeepSeek 上报的整段长度。文档说它等于命中加未命中，但实际上报的拆分并不总一致——两者之和小于整段长度时，旧理想值被低估，头条就夸大你浪费的 ¥，凭空造出账单上对不上的钱；而实际花费以前只按命中加未命中计价，那段对不上的缺口成了免费白送，一次未命中反而能算得比理想还便宜，账面上凭空「省下」一笔不存在的钱。现在理想值直接用整段 prompt 长度，实际花费把缺口也按未命中价计进去——拆分一致时行为不变，不一致时既不凭空多记、也不凭空少记，浪费的 ¥ 两边都对得上账单。
body.en: The counterfactual is 'the entire prompt had stayed cached', and the entire prompt is the full length DeepSeek reports. Docs say it equals cached plus miss, but the surfaced split isn't always consistent — when the two sum to less than the full length, the old ideal was understated and the headline overstated your wasted ¥, fabricating money you couldn't reconcile against your bill; and the actual cost used to price only cached plus miss, so the unaccounted gap was free, and a cache MISS could price out cheaper than ideal, fabricating 'savings' that don't exist. The ideal now uses the full prompt length directly, and the actual cost prices that gap at the miss rate too — behavior is unchanged when the split is consistent, and when it isn't there's neither phantom money nor phantom savings, so the wasted ¥ reconciles with your bill in both directions.

chips: › 未命中不再显示负浪费
› 浪费的 ¥ 对得上账单

title.zh: 打爆只归因到真正命中过的前缀，不甩锅给 MISS
title.en: A bust is pinned to a prefix that actually cached — never to a MISS

body.zh: 一个 MISS 本就没缓存过，它不该当一个「稳定前缀」的主人——可旧逻辑让它注册成了主人，于是后面一条采样头相同的请求（也是 MISS）就被对一个不稳定的主人判了打爆，重排建议还让你去钉一个自己都不缓存的前缀。现在只有 HIT/PARTIAL 才注册为指纹主人，游标只在可判定的条目上推进——打爆指向的永远是真正缓存过的那一条，建议也就不会再指错。
body.en: A MISS never cached, so it shouldn't register as the owner of a 'stable' prefix — yet it did, so a later request with the same sampled head (also a MISS) was busted against an unstable owner, and the reorder suggestion told you to pin to a prefix that itself didn't cache. Now only HIT/PARTIAL entries register as fingerprint owners, and the cursor advances only on judged entries — a bust always points back to a request that actually cached, so the suggestion never points you wrong.

title.zh: 改完一键对账：省回了多少打爆、多少 ¥
title.en: One-command before/after: busts recovered, CNY recovered

body.zh: 跑一轮 Agent 循环，照重排建议改完前缀，再跑一轮，然后 dscache report --compare baseline.jsonl 一张面板看到省回的打爆次数、省回的 ¥、成本比下降。这是那张可分享的「前后账单」对比，现在一条命令。诚实保留：面板写的是「省回」不是「省下」——dscache 没法证明你真的钉住了前缀（你可能改了 prompt 或重跑），它只报告当前账本里被判定为打爆的请求比基线少浪费了多少 ¥。
body.en: Run your agent loop, apply the reorder suggestion to fix the prefix, re-run, then dscache report --compare baseline.jsonl — one panel shows the recovered busts, recovered ¥, and cost-ratio drop. It's the shareable before/after-bill writeup, now one command. Honesty-preserving: the panel says 'recovered', not 'saved' — dscache can't prove you pinned the prefix (you may have changed the prompt or re-run); it reports only that the judged requests in the current ledger wasted less ¥ than the baseline.

headline.zh: 两行代码，把被打爆的缓存折扣拿回来
headline.en: Two lines of code, recover the cache discount you busted

sub.zh: 开源、Apache-2.0、无付费墙。本地账本，不挂后台，不联网取价。给 DeepSeek Agent 装一张 prefix-cache 利润表这件事，永不收费。
sub.en: Open source, Apache-2.0, no paywall. Local ledger, no background process, no price fetched over the network. The act of putting a prefix-cache P&L on your DeepSeek agent is never gated.

tag.zh: 给 DeepSeek Agent 装的 prefix-cache 利润表
tag.en: The prefix-cache profit & loss for your DeepSeek agent
